name: pincherMCP
description: Codebase intelligence MCP server for Claude Code. One plugin, one binary, local-only.

plugins.name: pincher
plugins.description: Codebase intelligence for LLM agents. Indexes any repo into a byte-offset symbol store, knowledge graph, and BM25 full-text search. 22 MCP tools with real BPE token-savings accounting. Pure Go, local-only, no cloud.
